ContactMessage.title: ContactMessage
ContactMessage.description: Represents a message sent by a user through the website's contact form. Updated to include toEmail for the Trigger Email extension.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ContactMessage entity.

fullName.description: The full name of the person sending the message.

email.description: The email address of the person sending the message.

message.description: The detailed content of the message.

sentAt.description: The timestamp when the contact message was sent.

toEmail.description: The target recipient email address for the Trigger Email extension.

/contact_messages/{contactMessageId}.description: Stores individual contact messages submitted through the website's contact form.
